evals.prompt: Prove the three sorry exercises in /work/users/shsingh/GitHub/misc/analysis/Analysis/Section_4_4.lean: `Nat.no_infinite_descent` (line 48, no infinitely descending sequence of naturals), `Nat.even_or_odd''` (line 64, every natural is even or odd), and `Nat.not_even_and_odd` (line 67, no natural is both even and odd). Work in the /work/users/shsingh/GitHub/misc/analysis/ directory. Use `lake build Analysis.Section_4_4` to verify. The file already imports Mathlib.Tactic.
